name: GOLFTEC Plano
about: GOLFTEC provides indoor golf instruction, practice, and club fitting services using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion tracking and launch monitors. Their lessons are data-driven, utilizing high-speed video analysis to help golfers of all levels improve their swing. The facilities are designed for focused practice and personalized coaching, offering a range of services from beginner swing evaluations to advanced on-course improvement strategies.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using motion capture and launch monitor technology
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA coaches
Access to advanced practice bays with real-time swing feedback
Comprehensive club fitting services with data-driven optimization

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for club and ball tracking during lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also offers club rentals and sells clubs from top brands if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at GOLFTEC facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies depending on whether you're taking a lesson, practicing with a simulator, or getting fitted, but typical sessions range from 30-90 minutes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and instruction for youth golfers, making it a suitable environment for kids learning the game.
